en: Mending the fold after the sheep is lost

cn: 从前有一个牧羊人，每天赶着羊群上山。
en: Once upon a time, there was a shepherd who drove his sheep up the mountain every day.

cn: 一天，他发现羊圈破了一个洞。
en: One day, he found a hole in the sheep pen.

cn: 他心想：羊还没丢，补它干嘛？于是转身离开。
en: He thought: The sheep are not lost yet, why fix it? So he turned and left.

cn: 第二天，他发现少了一只羊。原来狼从破洞钻进来叼走了它。
en: The next day, he found one sheep missing. A wolf had snuck through the hole and taken it.

cn: 牧羊人立刻修补了羊圈，从此羊再也没有丢过。
en: The shepherd promptly repaired the pen, and from then on, his sheep were never lost again.

cn: 这个故事告诉我们：出了问题及时补救，还不算晚。
en: This story teaches us: When problems arise, fixing them promptly is never too late.
